attacking_style: Early breakaway specialist who commits to long-range moves, showing ability to persist when others fade on selective Ardennes-type terrain with punchy climbs rather than sustained gradients.
team_tactics: Operates with autonomy in breakaways; no evidence of heavy domestique support or lead-out trains. Tactical freedom suggests opportunistic role rather than protected status.
terrain_preference: Selective Ardennes circuits with repeated punchy climbs where climbing strength differentiates from pure endurance riders. Struggles when peloton neutralizes efforts before key terrain.
vulnerability: Exposed when breaks are caught before decisive moments, leading to wasted energy expenditure. Wind splits and high-tempo peloton control can nullify his early aggression before selective terrain arrives.
key_patterns: Commits to early breakaways requiring sustained efforts over multiple hours
Outperforms pure endurance riders on selective climbing terrain despite GC focus
Vulnerable to peloton-controlled catch scenarios that drain energy before decisive moments
form_trajectory: unknown: 2023 effort failed tactically but 2021 showed strong breakaway survival; insufficient recent data for trend
